title: selaginella landii
intro: Selaginella landii, also known as the Spikemoss or Resurrection Plant, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are believed to help reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Selaginella landii include its ability to help lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression. Selaginella landii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
